productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Grey Handbags
description: Make a style statement effortlessly with this handbag from United Colours Of benetton which is not to be left behind for short trips, road trips, nor anything in between. It celebrates a blend of branded elements and distinctly smooth aesthetics. The classy silhouette created from leather is a must have. Time to take the office by storm and be the coolest at the mall  too!Made of 100% polyurethane on the outside and 100% polyester on the insideOne main compartment with organiser sleeves for mobile and essentialsZippered pocket on the front with Big Ben sliderHandle design with four buckles and two leather handlesLong leather strap insideTwo insert pockets on the sides and brand label embossed on all sides Length: 43 cmWidth: 15 cmHeight: 45 cmCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
